description: A train has derailed. A control center manager must coordinate the emergency response.

nodes.task_description: Receive an emergency call from a crew reporting a derailment.

expected_outcome.value: A critical incident case is opened.

nodes.task_description: Notify external emergency services (fire, police) and internal company leadership.
Stop all other train traffic in the vicinity of the derailment.

expected_outcome.value: The area is secured from other train movements.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a hazardous materials team if the derailed cars contain dangerous goods.

expected_outcome.value: A specialized team is dispatched if required.
